checks.summary: RaftSimEditor, RaftSim Tools menu registration, dockable Slate tab spawners, and the polished tool registry are source-controlled.
Replay + Debug Viewer, Rapid/River Editor, and Feature Tuning Editor shells have C++ config/view-model types plus JSON shell manifests.
Each shell names South Fork or Milestone 10 sample data and exposes validation state, blockers, or report links.

Tool validation actions cover source checks, deterministic export, solver package regeneration, stitched-window validation, live-water smoke, round-trip validation, and report opening; Slate buttons now run the C++ execution path.

RaftSim.CreateReviewedDataAssets generated reviewed Unreal DataAssets under /Game/RaftSim/Tools/Reviewed for the registry, replay/debug viewer, rapid/river editor shell, feature tuning editor shell, and validation actions.
RaftSim.CaptureToolEvidence opened all five RaftSim tool tabs and captured full-panel screenshots plus a manifest under docs/tool-captures/milestone25a/.
The workflow document describes how to open RaftSim Tools and review replay/debug, river authoring, feature tuning, validation, and playtest surfaces.
SmokeEmIfYouGotEmEditor Mac Development target built successfully with RaftSimEditor, shell view models, validation actions, and the Milestone 25A automation test source.
RaftSim.Milestone25A.PolishedToolingSliceGateManifest completed successfully under UnrealEditor-Cmd NullRHI with exit code 0.

automation_test_result.command: UnrealEditor-Cmd unreal/SmokeEmIfYouGotEm.uproject -unattended -nop4 -nosplash -NullRHI -NoSound -ExecCmds='Automation RunTests RaftSim.Milestone25A.PolishedToolingSliceGateManifest' -TestExit='Automation Test Queue Empty'
automation_test_result.log_evidence: LogAutomationController: Display: Test Completed. Result={Success} Name={PolishedToolingSliceGateManifest} Path={RaftSim.Milestone25A.PolishedToolingSliceGateManifest}

remaining_before_designer_polish: Replace text-heavy placeholder panels with feature-specific map, replay, curve, export, and playtest widgets.
Implement deterministic export/regeneration work behind the validation actions rather than evidence-check stubs.
Add native automated video capture or a documented reviewer recording workflow for editor tool sessions.
